rawAssistant: Tightening a plank ain't exactly my area of expertise, lad. We've got more pressing concerns 'round here – like them stone monsters that been causin' trouble lately. If you're plannin' on leavin' before dawn, make sure you check your lanterns for sure. They were blown out the last gale, and I'd hate to see you gettin' caught in a storm with no light.
